title: fimbristylis subaphylla
intro: Fimbristylis subaphylla, also known as the small-flowered finbristylis or dwarf grass-flower, is a type of aquatic plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating skin infections. Fimbristylis subaphylla is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used in traditional medicine as a paste or poultice.
